# Hi there, I'm Sharann Nagarajan👋

### 🚀 Angular Developer | Hybrid App Specialist

I’m a passionate Frontend Developer focused on building scalable, performant, and user-centric web and mobile applications. My expertise lies in the **Angular** ecosystem, extending into hybrid mobile development and backend services.
